prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-AOTAC-BUN-2PC-6PK-3B1-BLCK Product Type: HARDWARE_CLAMP_VISE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Secure Locking Tarp Clip Awning Clamps, 3.25 x 1 inch, 12 Pack Description: The ASR Outdoor Secure Clip Locking Awning Clamp is ideal for holding down tarps while camping or working on home improvement projects. They feature our secure grip adjustable step-up ridges to lock in place and will adjust to various thicknesses as needed.

Acting as an anchor point that will attach to a rope or bungee cord, they help to tie down and secure a tarp, tent, awning, plastic sheet, blanket, or whatever it is you are trying to cover or protect. Here's what you need to know:

- Made from sturdy plastic, these plastic clamps feature grip ridges to help secure and lock a tarp, tent, blanket or awning in place

- The adjustable clamps will adjust to various thicknesses depending on the material you are working with; they attach to the end of a tarp, tent or awning to provide an extra tying option and won't damage the material or leave holes behind

- The slide-lock enables the clip to be re-positioned and reused depending on the thickness of the material you are working with

- Resists cracking and breakage in freezing temperatures

- The multi-purpose clamp tools can be used not only to secure a camping tent, canopy tent, pop up tent, waterproof tarp, camping tarp or canvas tarp; they can be used to hold a projection screen in place, installed to erect work shelter or laundry line (and also act as clothespin), or be used on construction sites, to protect materials you have outdoors or for boating to name just a few. Search Terms: heavy duty slide lock clamp tarp locking awning hook tie down automotive accessory for on the go camping RV road trip across USA Features: - ADJUSTABLE LOCKING AWNING CLIP: Easy to use, the step-up slide lock is adjustable for multiple thicknesses; these tarp clamp are essential when it comes to securing your load. Pack these durable, high quality ABS plastic locking awning clips in your truck so they can be used as needed - STRONG TARP CLAMP: Designed to be tough, weatherproof and always reusable, these ABS plastic clamps will take a beating and keep on clipping. - SIMPLE TIME SAVING: Take the guess work out of tying knots, or even worse, untying someone else's knot by using these locking slide clips - EASY TO USE: To use, simply attach the clamp to your tent, tarp, awning or other by adjusting the slide lock forward or back to secure or reposition as needed; the clamps are adjustable to a variety of different thicknesses - UNIVERSAL APPLICATION USE: Use to help secure or tie down a tarp, tent, awning, plastic sheeting or even a projection screen; the reusable grip clamps can be used to erect a laundry line and also act as clothespins; the plastic clamps can also be used on construction sites, for work shelters, to protect materials you have outdoors or for boating === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 12-Pack 3.25x1in Black Tarp Locking Clamps

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 12-Pk 3.25 x 1 in Black Locking Tarp Clips

anthropic.title_differentiation: Adjustable Slide Lock, Heavy Duty ABS Plastic, Weatherproof, Reusable, Secure Awning And Tent Clips

openai.title_differentiation: Adjustable Slide Lock, Heavy Duty ABS Plastic, Weatherproof Reusable, Multi Purpose Secure Grip
